assertionResults.reason: At 375px on /concert, each concert card rendered as a consistently sized rounded container with visible elevated shadow (12px radius; shadows including 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) on the lead card). Cards used a strong purple-pink gradient visual treatment over the header area with white text; no imagery was present, but the gradient treatment made artist/title/date/venue text clearly readable and satisfied the assertion's imagery-or-gradient requirement. Page width matched viewport width (375px), so there was no horizontal overflow in the validated state.

evidence.network: Observed successful authenticated navigation to /concert after login; no failing requests were required for this visual assertion. Console only showed React DevTools info and Fast Refresh logs.

cards.gradient: linear-gradient(to right bottom, rgb(147, 51, 234), rgb(219, 39, 119), rgb(126, 34, 206))
linear-gradient(to right bottom, rgb(147, 51, 234), rgb(219, 39, 119), rgb(126, 34, 206))

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-VIS-007): passed. Concert cards on mobile used strong gradient treatment with readable white text, rounded corners, and shadow/elevation.
